description: Internal: cross-team request for content localization timeline — formal reply

input.ticket_text: Hi, I'm from the localization team. We need to understand the content delivery schedule for Q2 so we can plan our translation pipeline. Could you provide a breakdown of planned content releases for April-June? We need at least 3 weeks lead time per batch.

notes: Internal ticket — tone should be professional/collegial, not customer-support style. Reply must not invent Q2 schedule details.
